title: gentiana pedicellata subsp. zeylanica
intro: Gentiana pedicellata subsp. zeylanica, also known as Ceylon gentian, is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family that is native to Sri Lanka. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ceylon gentian include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Gentiana pedicellata subsp. zeylanica can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
